memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of the Brain DB rather than the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for the Brain personal memory system.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later as an integration for the Brain personal memory system.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for the Brain personal memory system.

details: Identified durable architecture decisions for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack.
Preserved Telegram and model choice as open questions rather than current facts.
